task1.title: Southside, a shopping mall, as it is now and plans for its development
task1.instruction: The maps show Southside, a shopping mall, as it is now and plans for its development. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: The best way to make the road transport of goods safer is to ask drivers to take a driving test each year. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
